evidence: copilot --help output (v1.0.40) contains: --model <model>  Set the AI model to use
copilot --help output (v1.0.40) contains: --effort / --reasoning-effort <level> (choices: low, medium, high, xhigh)
wrapper script orchestrator_worker_external.sh receives RESOLVED_MODEL via 6th arg but was not passing it to CLI
NOTE: previous B-101 comment '# NOTE: Copilot CLI does not expose a --model flag' was INCORRECT — based on older CLI version
copilot-daemon.notes: Copilot CLI v1.0.40 supports --model flag. The wrapper script should be updated to pass --model when RESOLVED_MODEL is non-empty. Actual model confirmed/returned by CLI is not discoverable at runtime (CLI does not echo which model ran), so actualModelDiscoverable remains false.
copilot-daemon.b101Impact: B-101 classified provider as PROVIDER_MANAGED_MODEL_ONLY because --model flag was not observed. B-103 capability check confirms flag IS present in CLI v1.0.40. modelPropagationStatus should be updated from 'provider-managed' to 'propagated' once the wrapper script passes --model. The noTaskReason / attribution work from B-102 is unaffected.
copilot-daemon.actionRequired: DONE — orchestrator_worker_external.sh updated to pass --model "$RESOLVED_MODEL" when RESOLVED_MODEL is non-empty (B-103).
